title: salacia cognata
intro: Salacia cognata, also known as Kokilaksha or Bitter Caltrops, is a perennial plant native to the tropical forests of India, belonging to the family Capparaceae. It has been used in traditional Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant is valued for its health benefits, such as reducing blood sugar levels, managing cholesterol and triglyceride levels, and preventing the formation of kidney stones. Salacia cognata is commonly prepared as a decoction or a powder for oral consumption, and its extracts are also used in modern herbal supplements.
